expectations.text: Response identifies Quran.com API v4 as primary
expectations.evidence: Response opens with: 'The primary API provider for Islam is Quran.com API v4'

expectations.text: Response provides the correct endpoint with surah:ayah key format
expectations.evidence: Endpoint provided: 'GET https://api.quran.com/api/v4/verses/by_key/{surah}:{ayah}?language=en&translations={id}&words=false' -- correct surah:ayah key format

expectations.text: Response correctly identifies translation ID 20 as Sahih International
expectations.evidence: 'The translation ID for Sahih International is 20' -- correct. Full example URL provided: /verses/by_key/2:255?language=en&translations=20&words=false
Fallback section explicitly names AlQuran.cloud with endpoint pattern: 'https://api.alquran.cloud/v1/ayah/{surah}:{ayah}/{edition}'
